# Introduction

This is a book created from markdown and executable code.

See @knuth84 for additional discussion of literate programming.

```{r}
1 + 1
```

Now we're moving on to github. Right, so if we were smart, we'd have made this project and the book and THEN told github to add an existing repo from this folder. Naturally, I fucked it.

We need to go to Github –\> repo –\> settings –\> pages –\> branch –\> (none \> main) & (root \> docs) –\> save

also change the repo 'about' website to the github pages website

Don't include more than one level 1 header in a qmd file bc then it treats it as a separate chapter and that's a pain in the ass for editing
